audio.generateSfxTitle: Yi amfani da gida LLM don karanta rubutu a matsayin wasan radio kuma ba da shawarar sunayen ingantaccen — sannan tabbatar da kiti da kake hannu. Ake saka su zuwa aikin lokaci-domin amsa.

audio.voicesTitle: Ba wani muryar da aka ɗuba ma kowane mai magana (yazawa manifest.voice.speaker_map).
createvoice.doneFooterNote: Ƙara shi zuwa harko a wannan show na Voice Roster / fihiristi don amfani shi zuwa VO.
createvoice.footerNote: Kwafai ta hanyar OmniVoice akan 2080 Ti. Tsuratsura ana kwafai zuwa 24kHz mono. Muryar da samma suna an canza.

createvoice.hintTestLine: (na raina — samarwa misali don ka ji kwafin)
createvoice.hintVoiceName: (misali Vivian — ya zama OmniVoice profayil suna)

createvoice.title: SAMAR DA MURYAR
createvoice.workingMsg: Yana fara OmniVoice (farkon kwafai na jira iya ɗauki har zuwa ~3 min don jijiya GPU) da kwafai… nade wannan bubuwa.

diagnostics.bannerFailed: Wasu wajibaaci gwajin suka gazawa — duba ƙasa.

filemenu.cloneVoicesBody.one: Shigidun nan ya kawo da {n} muryar azaman clip ƙwalliya. Sake kwafinta ta sake gina shi a wannan injin OmniVoice na injin kuma ta sake nuna {show}'s magana. Yana fara OmniVoice kuma yana amfani da GPU (~kaɗan tsabar). Za ka iya yi shi daga gida zaɓin muryar.
filemenu.cloneVoicesBody.other: Shigidun nan ya kawo da {n} muryoyi azaman clips ƙwalliya. Sake kwafinta ta rake gina su a wannan injin OmniVoice na injin kuma ta sake nuna {show}'s magana. Yana fara OmniVoice kuma yana amfani da GPU (~kaɗan tsabar kowa). Za ka iya yi shi daga gida zaɓin muryar.
filemenu.cloneVoicesFailed: Kasa: {names}. Sake yi shi daga zaɓin muryar da OmniVoice ya yi lafiya.
filemenu.exportAssetsCheckbox: Haɗa assets (muryoyi, SFX, kiɗa) — girki zip
filemenu.exportBody: Bundles show text (script, manifest, youtube) + title-card templates. Da assets a, yana haɗa da binary source da manifest yana tunawa shi — OmniVoice muryar ƙwalliya clips, SFX, da kiɗa — da provenance catalogs, don mai kasuwa iya shigida shi kuma bugun rigenerate buttons. Generated media (rendered video / final mp4) ba ma zama a)..
filemenu.exportVoiceHint: (Muryar gida iya fittar daga Sauti page's muryar zaɓin.)
filemenu.newEpisodeHint: Scaffolds manifest + script seeded daga nuni defaults. Sannan rubuta script kuma ceci Generate manifest.
filemenu.newShowHint: Kashaye za su zama a sabuwar folder. Muryar/girki defaults an kwafi daga jarrumawa default nuni — baje su ƙarƙari Settings → Nuni metadata.
filemenu.shutdownBody: Wannan yana sakowa GPU — yana tsayar da ComfyUI, OmniVoice, da Ollama containers — sannan yana tsayar da server din Studio. Don amfani da Studio kuma za ka buƙatar fara shi daga terminal (<0>{cmd}</0>, ko systemd service).
filemenu.shuttingDown: MACU Studio yana sakowa GPU kuma yana tsayar…
filemenu.shuttingDownBody: Za ka iya rufar tab din browser yanzu. Fara Studio kuma daga terminal idan ka so komowa.
graphics.bespokeCardDesc: wannan an rubuta shi azaman bayanai, ba daga ajiye tsarin, saboda babu filayen da za a iya sarrafa tukuna. Zaɓi tsarin a ƙarƙashi + cika rubutu don sa shi editable (ko tsara sabuwar tsarin tare da AI).
graphics.bespokeHint: Nuna "Saita" (ba "Saɓa") saboda wannan karti an rubuta shi azaman bayanai, ba daga tsarin da za a iya sarrafa. Saita shi koli don sa shi Saɓa-nable.
graphics.bespokeNoLayout: kaɗai — babu tsarin da za a iya sarrafa
graphics.briefPlaceholder: e.g. a Crater Bowl scoreboard: SECTOR NINE SLAGS vs SECTOR FOUR GLOWBOYS, girma lambar fintsi ticking 2 → 1, 'PLAYERS REMAINING' a ƙarƙashi
graphics.cantRenameHint: — ba a iya mayar da suna; sabuwa karti don canja id
graphics.cardBlurb.freshTitle: Rubunta koli ta kowane jiya (intro layout). AI yana rubuta manyan layin ubanta gida (gajeriya, duk-capital, mai tsoro) + kicker + logline daga rubutu.
graphics.cardBlurb.macuTitle: A buɗɗe mai sake dawowa (intro layout). Wordmark an ɗaure da "THE MACU / REPORT"; AI ya rubuta ne ɗan kicker tease + station-ID sub.
graphics.cardBlurb.weather: Yankin kasua (weather layout). Ranar yau mai tsoro jiya a baje na zamani.
graphics.cardConfigureTitle: Saita — wannan karti ba shi da tsarin da za a iya sarrafa tukuna; saita shi don sa shi regen-able
graphics.cardRegenTitle: Saɓa — saɓa daga ajiye tsarin + filayen
graphics.cardTypeNote: Karti nau'i kawai ma'ana idan kun taɓa "Rubuta rubutu tare da AI" — yana zaɓi baba, waɗanne filayen za su rubuta, da snap tsarin zuwa karti nau'i's composition. Rubuta filayen kanka kula da shi.
graphics.compGeneratedSuccess: tsarin "{key}" an sabuwa da zaɓa a sama — yanzu cika rubutu a jiya 3.
graphics.configureBtnTitle: Wannan karti ba shi da ajiye tsarin/rubutu tukuna — saita shi koli, sai ya zama Saɓa-able
graphics.createPendingBriefTitle: Kun rubuta bayani a jiya 2 — taɓa 'Sabuwa tsarin' na farko, ko share bayani don amfani da zaɓa tsarin
graphics.designWithAiHelp: Aiki kawai lokacin babu tsarin a sama da ji. Bayar bayani karti; jiya jiya (Qwen) yana rubuta sabuwar HyperFrames tsarin da safi shi a ƙarƙashi da suna daga jiya 1. Kuna har yanzu cika rubutu a jiya 3.
graphics.designWithAiSummary: ✨ ko tsara sabuwar tsarin gida tare da AI
graphics.editBtnTitle: Sarrafa wannan karti's tsarin ko rubutu, sai ga saɓa
graphics.editModalFooterHint: Safi sauye-sauye ku da saɓa karti.
graphics.genCompBtnTitle: Sabuwa sabuwar HyperFrames tsarin daga wannan bayani, ajiye a ƙarƙashi da suna a jiya 1
graphics.generateFirstWarning: Taɓa "Sabuwa composition" don gina wannan tsarin. Har sai kun yi, "Sabuwa + saɓa" yana amfani da zaɓa tsarin a sama da yin watsi da wannan bayani.
graphics.nameFirstWarning: ↑ maye karti a jiya 1 na farko — ya zama sabuwar tsarin suna.
graphics.newModalFooterHint: Safi karti da saɓa shi azaman mp4.
graphics.noTitleSelected: Babu ubansa zaɓa — zaɓi daya daga kartu a gida.
graphics.regenBtnTitle: Saɓa wannan karti daga nusa tsarin + filayen
graphics.renderMissingBtn: Saɓa waɗanda ba a samu ba
graphics.sharedFileNotFound: kasuwa raba/titles/ — fayil ba a samu ba
graphics.step1Hint: Gajeriya id, amfani azaman sunaye. e.g. lower_third, scoreboard.
graphics.step2Hint: A "composition" shine jiya template — yana yanke inda rubutu ya zauna da kuma ta motsi. Duba yana nuni da zaɓa tsarin; ‹TOKENS› yana tanda inda jiya 3 rubutu ya gida.
graphics.step3Hint: Wadannan darajar suni ‹TOKENS› a tsarin. Rubuta su, ko bari AI rubuta su daga jiya rubutu.
graphics.thumbClickTitle: Taɓa don fadada · duba nau'uka · ga tsarin + filayen
graphics.thumbModalDesc: Saɓa youtube_thumb composition zuwa final/{slug}_thumb.png. Jiya thumbnail an ajiye na farko.
graphics.writeTextBtnTitle: Rubuta rubutu a ƙarƙashi daga jiya rubutu, a ƙarƙashi da karti nau'i baba
graphics.writeThumbBtnTitle: Rubuta punchy tsaro-tsaro thumbnail kaka tare da jiya local LLM (Ollama)
localize.busyOrUnrendered: yin ganinsa jiya kafin lokaci, ko jira don yin ganinsa da akwai yanzu
localize.haikuNote: Don mafi kyawu juyar da kankamanci, bugi Claude a cikin drawer na terminal — babu cloud hook a cikin app.
localize.renderFirst: Yin ganinsa jiya kafin lokaci ƙari — gida jiya tana amfani da hotuna da subtitle da aka gama, saboda haka ita ce ire mai kumsa.
localize.runningNote: Kowane harshe ya fuzunta a jerin GPU, daya a lokaci. Kuna iya rufe hakan — yana ci gaba.
localize.title: Gida jiya — subtitle + dubbing

placeholder.comingSoon: Ana sabon aiki. v0.1 yana jiyon Stage 5 (Assembly) gida-gida. Wasu jiya za su fito a magana nau'i.
script.generateTitle: Sake bugi script.md zuwa manifester cues (gani kafin rubuta)
script.mergeHelp: Cues ana sake bugi daga <0>script.md</0> kuma aka haɗa; maka mai sauti, ƙararren halaye, b-roll, comfyui/style/kiɗi kuma abubuwan da ake gabatarwa an adana. <1>manifest.json.bak</1> mai alamar lokaci ana rubuta kafin amsa.
script.modeDiffTitle: Kwatanta nau'ikan da aka saba (haske da aka ƙara / ja wanda aka yanke)
script.noChangesDetail: Rubutu yayi daidai da manifester — babu abin da za a rubuta.
script.noDiffChanges: Babu sauye tsakanin waɗannan nau'ikan biyu.
script.noVersionsYet: Babu nau'ikan da aka saba a yanzu. Bugi git sync button don ƙwantar da rubutu, sannan koma nema daidaita.
script.oneVersionOnly: Nau'i ɗaya ne kawai zuwa yanzu ({label}). Saba a sake bugi nemi daidaita.
script.renumbered: ⚠ sake lambar (VO cache na iya sake gina)

settings.git.stub: Saita nesa Adireshi da rashin da Studio yana daidaita rubutu/fihiristi/youtube zuwa. Imaili suna amfani da maɓalli SSH na akwati. Ana zuwa nan gida.
settings.lang.help: Canja harshen haɗin gwiwa. Ana aiki jiya kuma an adana shi a wannan na'ura.

sfx.helpMusicNoRender: ba zai gudna ba a lokacin render

sfx.phMusicPrompt: misali: 'sickly lo-fi big-band waltz, tape hiss, mono'

sfxgen.gain.label: g
sfxgen.gain.title: karɓa — 0–1 madaidaita
sfxgen.idle.body: Karanta rubutu azaman radio play kuma ba da shawara sauti — fabara ta kit ɗin da kake da shi.
sfxgen.idle.hint: Danna Fara don fara — yana bugun Ollama akan GPU, ~30-60s.
sfxgen.loading.body: Yana neman lokacin local LLM (Qwen2.5-7B) don karanta rubutu azaman radio play…
sfxgen.review.empty: Babu tsofaffar sauti — tsarin ya yarda rubutu ba ya bukaca komai, ko komai ƙi-a saita.
sfxgen.review.helpText: Amfani ya saka waɗannan cikin sauti timeline (manifest.sfx[]) kaman jefa-jefa — per-gap delays an sani-sani. Karɓargarji tasiri yana aiki nan-nan; "don karɓa" tasiri shine placeholders har sai ka fita su (Karɓargarji → Ƙara → Freesound) a gida da aka nuna; render yana tsallake sauti komai ba jiya a disk.
sfxgen.section.acquire: BUKACI SAMAR DA ({count}) — buga bugun, fita daga karɓargarji jiya
sfxgen.section.existing: AMFANI DA SFX NA JIB ({count}) — dabe-dabe a kit
sfxgen.title: SAMAR DA JERIN SFX
sfxgen.toast.applied: SFX jeri ya amfani — {placed} saita ({reused} daga karɓargarji{acq})
shotgen.applyFootnote: Aiwatar bugi zube jerin hotaye[] da rubutu sabuwa char/b-roll defs. Sake amfani mafaka a ci gida core + ijaye.
shotgen.emptyAllFilled: Duka jerin akwai gida hotaye — babu abin cika. Bugi akwashi a sama ne sake zube duka jirgin.
shotgen.emptyNoShots: Model ba shi ƙera hotaye. Jejeƴa.
shotgen.errorGpuBusy: GPU dana — sake yi aktif. Jejeƴa sa lokacin bahakar.
shotgen.loadingMain: Bukaru local LLM (Qwen2.5-7B) ne zube hotaye…
shotgen.onlyMissingLabel: Shaye jerin babu hotaye ne kawai
shotgen.onlyMissingTooltip: A kan: shaye jerin babu hotaye ne (ba za amu taɓa jerin da sauni ne). A bugi: sake zube duka jerin (bugi hotaye da sauyi).
shotgen.sectionNewChars: SABUWA jerin char — ƙera (gyara core idan kike so)
shotgen.title: ƘERA JERIN HOTON

topbar.stopConfirm: SAKACIN BINCIKI - kashe sauri mai aiki, share ComfyUI queue, da sace GPU ajiya?

topbar.updateTitle: Sabuntawa akwai samu — {behind} sabuwar commit(s). Taɓa don duba da shiryawa.
tour.assembly.body: Falon bukattar jaji. Aiki bukattar pipeline cikakke-cikakke zuwa bidiyon amma tamma, tare da bukazin baba per-stage. Shi nawa haukakin - bada basira ta dadewa.
tour.assembly.title: Haɗin
tour.audio.body: Per-cue muryar kwana — bugi ta, sake samar line, kuma jeka sunayen ingantaccen a tsakanin cues.
tour.audio.title: VO
tour.docs.body: Canon — halaye bible, bayanan shawarar, kuma bayanan pipeline. Bayani, ba gyara.
tour.docs.title: Docs
tour.episodePicker.body: Zaɓi jirgan; ◀ ▶ kibiyoyin ci gaba tsakanin su. Ɓama shi ne git-sync yafi — jage shi ne aka tura, ja shi ne sauye na gida.
tour.episodePicker.title: Zaɓin jirgan
tour.gitSync.body: Ƙidayar jirgan nan - rubutu, manifester, youtube.txt - zuwa ajiye kuma tura ta. Abubuwan da ake bugi na yi a gida; wannan shi ne ajibaw tushe.
tour.gitSync.title: Git saba
tour.graphics.body: Karatun bajajeniya da kan saman alloye. Rubuta karatun jajin kuma aiki jikunkiran da ake daidaita akan bidiyo.
tour.graphics.title: Zane
tour.projectMenu.body: Sababbin ko bubuwa dabbobi kuma jirga, shigo/fita aiki, kuma saituna — duka a nan. Studio za ta iya riƙe da yawa dabbobi a yanzu.
tour.projectMenu.title: Menun aiki
tour.ready.body: Ka shirya - farawa ta ƙirƙira sabuwar dabbo daga asali: bubuwa menun aiki kuma zaɓi Sabuwar dabbo.... Sake bubuwa wannan tours a daidai asali. Ku yi nishaɗi.
tour.ready.title: A shirye don farawa
tour.script.body: Rubuta jirgan a Markdown, sannan bugi Samar da manifester don sake cacar su zuwa cues pipeline na iya aiki.
tour.script.title: Rubutu
tour.video.body: Jerin harkokin — kowane halaye kuma b-roll clips. Aiki waɗanda babu ko tsohuwar; gani yana nuna kowane sakamakon.
tour.video.title: Bidiyo
tour.youtube.body: Daidaita jirga zuwa nau'ikan su kuma ƙura bayanan alamar bidiyo title/description.
tour.youtube.title: YouTube
update.dirtyWarning: Wannan checkout yana da local changes — auto-sabunta an dakatar don canji. Commit ko discard su (ko sabunta daga terminal) na farko.
update.idleHint: Danna "Dubawa sabuntawa" don neman gida sabunta.
update.phaseBuilding: Sabuntawa (deps + UI)… wannan zai iya ɗaukar dakika.
update.phaseRestartNeeded: Sabunta ya gina. Sake fara server ta hannu don karɓa shi.
update.phaseRestarting: Sake fara — page zai reload kanta.
update.title: Sabuntawa software
update.updateHint: "Sabunta & sake fara" pulls, gina sabunta UI, kuma sake fara service (~1 min). Page ta reload kanta lokacin da ta koma.
versions.promoteTitle: Ɗaga wannan version zuwa kai tsaye
video.addShotHelp: Yana ƙara {kind} maɓalli a fihiristi. Jera shi daga JERIN HARKOKIN.
video.addShotHelpWithCue: Yana ƙara {kind} maɓalli a fihiristi da harko zuwa @{cue}. Jera shi daga JERIN HARKOKIN.
video.emptyManifest: Babu harkokin jiya ko alaaba a cikin fihiristi.
video.generateShotListTitle: Yi amfani da LLM na gida don ba da shawarwari game da jerin harkokin daga rubutu (sake amfani da harkokin da suka sake)
video.precacheTitle: Loda duka harkokin bide da aka jera zuwa bayyanin yanar gida don hoto na gaggawa ta hanyar Cloudflare proxy
video.renderAllMissing: Yi kadarwa duka da ba su da ladi/ba su fito
video.seedVersionReadOnly: Seed na siga da ake kallonsa (ba za a iya canza ba)

voicepicker.exportVoiceTitle: Zazzage tsuratsura da aka birgima ta {name} — sake-shigarwa akan wata na'ura
voicepicker.noCharacters: Babu harkokin har yanzu — ƙara ɗaya ƙasa, ko Generate fihiristi don zaa su daga rubutu.
voicepicker.omnivoiceStopped: OmniVoice tsayawa — kwafi ko jera don jera murya
youtube.captions.clientHelp: Lokaci daya: ƙirƙiri OAuth client na nau'i "TVs and Limited Input devices" a cikin abin n'iya na Google Cloud (wanda ke da YouTube Data API a buɗewa), sannan bushe ID da sirri nasu a nan.
youtube.captions.noTracks: Babu wajajen alaƙalake har yanzu — sake jiya jerin wannan a farko.
youtube.captions.noVideo: Babu video na YouTube da ya dace da jerin wannan.
youtube.captions.quotaNote: Kowane tuɓa yana amfani da kusan 400 na iyaliwa na YouTube kwanaki-kwanaki (~25 tuɓoɓi a ranar a kan iyaliwar ajiya ta tsakiya).
youtube.captions.title: Alaƙalake
youtube.captions.waiting: Jira kaɗai da ke samun izini…
youtube.notConfiguredBody: Ƙara API key + channel id zuwa <0>~/.config/macu-studio/youtube.json</0> (ko saitun <1>YOUTUBE_API_KEY</1> / <2>YOUTUBE_CHANNEL_ID</2>) don nuna daidaitun bubuwan ake turawa a nan.
filemenu.macuWebConnectHint: A kan mayorawesome.com, bugi ninka → Sarrafa → Haɗa MACU Studio → Samar haɗin token, kwafai shi, kuma ɗora shi a nan. Yana haɗa ditin nesa da shaferun aiki a isastaccen mataki.
filemenu.macuWebConnectedHint: An haɗa zuwa <0>{base}</0>. Lokacin da aka zaɓi jerin abubuwa zai kamata a zama jama'a; waɗanda ba a zaɓa ba ana turawa amma akwai boye a matsayin daftarori. Sannan Bugawa.
toast.macuWebCommitted: an ɗora gida ({files} fayiloli) — saita shaferun aiki don turawa
